entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop whose productivity is restrained by drought stress.

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stress caused by lack of water that affects crop productivity.

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant genotype to maintain productivity under drought conditions.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERGENCE
entities.description: The degree of genetic difference between selected genotypes of chickpea.

entities.name: IRRIGATED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Control conditions where water is provided to the crop.

entities.name: PLANT YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of crop produced per plant, which is reduced under drought stress.

entities.name: PRINCIPLE COMPONENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to analyze biplots and identify correlations among traits.

entities.name: CORRELATION STUDIES
entities.description: Statistical analysis used to determine the relationship between different morpho-physiological and yield traits.

entities.name: RELATIVE WATER CONTENT
entities.description: A morpho-physiological trait positively correlated with plant yield under drought stress.

entities.name: MEMBRANE STABILITY INDEX
entities.description: A morpho-physiological trait positively correlated with plant yield under drought stress.

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL INDEX
entities.description: A morpho-physiological trait positively correlated with plant yield under drought stress.

entities.name: SECONDARY BRANCHES
entities.description: A morpho-physiological trait positively correlated with plant yield under drought stress.

entities.name: DROUGHT SUSCEPTIBILITY INDEX
entities.description: A trait negatively correlated with plant yield under drought stress.

entities.name: DAYS TO MATURITY
entities.description: The time taken for the crop to reach maturity, negatively correlated with plant yield under drought stress.

entities.name: 100 SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of 100 seeds, negatively correlated with plant yield under drought stress.

entities.name: EARLINESS
entities.description: The trait of reaching maturity earlier, suggested as a strategy for drought tolerance.

entities.name: SEED-FILLING STAGE
entities.description: The growth stage where seeds are filled, which begins earlier in drought-tolerant genotypes.
